description.ko: ECHO-0는 음향 주파수를 역동적인 시각적 풍경으로 변환하는 몰입형 디지털 아트 경험입니다. 생성 알고리즘을 통해 소리와 빛의 교차점을 탐구합니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is an immersive digital art experience that translates acoustic frequencies into dynamic, visual landscapes. It explores the intersection of sound and light through generative algorithms.

prompt: Abstract sound visualization of ECHO-0, kinetic light patterns reacting to sonic frequencies, undulating wave forms in a dark void, neon cyan and deep violet glows, high-tech aesthetic, minimalist design, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting.
